- "The Rise And Fall Of A Midwest Princess" on hype sticker.

"MADE IN CZECH REPUBLIC" sticker attached to the rear shrink wrap.

Track B2 is titled "Hot-To-Go" on the slipcase and "Hot To Go!" on the inner sleeve.
Side D is blank.

Runouts are laser-etched.

Double Album Featuring the Single 'Reflektor'
180g Vinyl

2018 hype sticker looks almost identical to 2013 vinyl release sticker, however there is no download code on this release, so that text has been removed on this reissue sticker.

Gatefold sleeve includes two printed inner sleeves. Sleeve and inner sleeves are light reflecting. (Same as 2013 vinyl release)

Made in the EU.

resource.title: Exotica Deluxe
resource.notes:
Limited 'Exotica' Deluxe Edition on Double Vinyl in Purple.
Includes a Poster with original album artwork (front side) + many career spanning images (back side)
Includes the full 'Exotica' Album + 3 Bonus Tracks.

resource.title: The Understanding
resource.notes:
Edition of 2000 copies.
Comes in numbered gatefold sleeve with credits. The records are housed in color inner sleeves with lyrics.

"WALL LP 035" appears on inner sleeves and labels.
Second catalog number "09463114811 8" appears on spine only.
Individual catalog numbers for each disc appear on the respective inner sleeves and labels:
LP1: 09463114821 7
LP2: 09463114831 6

"WALLLP035" is misprinted as "WALLP035" on rear gatefold sleeve.

Runout information is etched. "1△", "1T", "1⋀", and "3=" are mirrored.

[Information given on rear gatefold sleeve:]
All tracks ℗ & © 2005 Wall of Sound. All rights of the producer and of the owner of thr record work reserved. Unauthorized copying, public performance, broadcasting, hiring or rental of this record is prohibited.

WALLP035

[Information given inside gatefold sleeve:]
All tracks ℗ & © 2005 Wall of Sound.

B1 contains a sample from "Kill Me With Your Love" by [url=https://www.discogs.com/artist/515961-Jericho-Jones-2]Jericho[/url], courtesy of [l904], a sample from "Love Me The Life I Lead" performed by [a269102], courtesy of [l25407], published by [l23694].
D3 contains a sample from "Who We Are", performed by [a140646], courtesy of [l5320] Records, published by [l418026]/[l25066].

[a70622] appears courtesy of [l8847].
[a325359] appears courtesy of [l12349].

[Information given on labels:]
All tracks ℗ & © 2005 Virgin Music, a division of EMI Music France, under exclusive license to Wall Of Sound for UK/Ireland. All rights of the producer and of the owner of thr record work reserved. Unauthorized copying, public performance, broadcasting, hiring or rental of this record is prohibited. [number for respective LP] / WALL LP 035 / 03098 / Made in EU

[Conflicting credits:]
℗ & © credits are given to Wall of Sound on rear and inside gatefold sleeve. The labels are the same as the ones from previous releases with ℗ & © credits given to Virgin Music and Licensed To Wall Of Sound credit.

[Information not given on release:]
Pressed By, Lacquer Cut At and Lacquer Cut By derived from runout grooves.

resource.title: Black Holes And Revelations
resource.notes:
℗ & © 2006 Warner Music UK Limited.
Made in the EU
All tracks mixed at Townhouse studios except 'Hoodoo' mixed at Avatar Studios, New York and 'Starlight' mixed at Sony Music Studios, New York assisted by Mark Rinaldi.
muse.mu

This release is roughly similar to [r=7220106], except for the Warner Bros logo (which has been replaced by Warner Records on this one) and the runout identifiers.

This release is almost identical to [r=23218028] apart from the "Made in Czech Republic" sticker on the back, which is not stuck to the cover underneath the shrink, but either on the outside of the shrink or not included. Variant 7, 8 and 9 have "Made in Czech Republic" sticker on the back cover of the sleeve.

The runouts are hand-etched apart from the [Invalid Label] (204142E#/A#), which are laser-etched.

resource.title: Reanimation
resource.notes:
How to identify this version:
• New "Warner Records" logo is printed on the back of the gatefold sleeve;
• "Made in the Netherlands" is printed on the back of the gatefold sleeve;
• "Made in the Netherlands" and catalog number "093624920830" are printed on the LP labels.

All tracks except A1, A4, B3 to B5, C2, C5, C6 originally appear on the Warner Records album Hybrid Theory, produced by Don Gilmore. Mixed by Andy Wallace. Original versions of "My December" and "High Voltage" produced by Mike Shinoda.

Track B2 contains elements from "One Step Closer" & "Forgotten" reinterpreted by Sean C & Roc Raida. 
Track B3 contains elements from "All For One" (D. Murphy/L. Dechalus/M. Dixon). Universal Music Corp. ASCAP. Performed by Brand Nubian. Produced under license from Elektra Recording Corp. by arrangement with Warner Special Products.

On back:
© ℗ 2002 Warner Records Inc., a Warner Music Group Company. 777 S. Santa Fe Ave., Los Angeles, CA 90021; 1633 Broadway, New York, 
NY 10019-6708. [Standard Copyright Text] Made in the Netherlands.

resource.title: Hybrid Theory
resource.notes:
Reissue of the limited edition Walmart exclusive red vinyl. Compared to the original 2021 Walmart drop this version has some differences in the design of the Gatefold and lyric sheet.

The inlay looks like it has the same design as for one of the HT:20 box releases.
The small LP Logos printed on top of the tracklist on the back of the Gatefold are printed much smaller.
The layout below of the tracklist with the barcode, legal texts, web adresses and logos is different. The barcode is on top of everything instead of below. The web links have a different position and arrangement. The logo of "Machine Shop" right beside of the "Warner Records" logo has been changed to the newest version as seen on the "Machine Shop" website. Record labels seem to be the same as they still have the old "Machine Shop" logo.

resource.title: Minutes To Midnight
resource.notes:
Includes insert.

1|5 and 1|= are found mirrored and hand-etched into the runouts. 0093624998105 is hand-etched into the runouts. Everything else is stamped.

©℗ 2007 Warner Records Inc.
Made in Germany.

resource.title: Changes
resource.notes:
Record Store Day (Black Friday) release.

Mint / sea foam green vinyl with 12" insert and download card.

This vinyl only has the first 10 tracks from the digital album. The download card is for all 13 tracks.
